zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning於1808年4月11日出生在美國田納西州時，她的父親John Whitehead25歲，母親Harriet22歲。她於大約1824年與Henry W Shuffield結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1880年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇且於1900年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林亨德森 堂史普。她去世於1905年12月13日在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓享年97歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning于1808年4月11日出生在美国田纳西州时，她的父亲John Whitehead25岁，母亲Harriet22岁。她于大约1824年与Henry W Shuffield结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1880年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇且于1900年住在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林亨德森 堂史普。她去世于1905年12月13日在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓享年97岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥。

nameMeanings.name: Whitehead
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English whit ‘white’ + hed ‘head’ (Old English hwīt + hēafod), denoting a person with white or fair hair. Occasionally perhaps from Middle English whīt ‘white’ + hod ‘hood’ (Old English hwīt + hōd).
Irish: adopted by erroneous translation of Ó Ceanndubháin ‘descendant of the little black-headed one’ (see Canavan ), as if from Gaelic ceann ‘head’ + bán ‘white’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Weisshaupt (see Weishaupt ) or Weisskopf (see Weiskopf ).

variants.name: Canavan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan.

Irish (Galway and Mayo; Wexford): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceanndubháin ‘descendant of Ceanndubhán’, a byname meaning ‘little black-headed one’, from ceann ‘head’ + dubh ‘black’ + the diminutive suffix -án.

variants.name: Whitted
meanings: Scottish: probably a shortened form of   Whitehead  .

variants.name: Whittet
meanings: Scottish (Perthshire and Angus): variant of   Whitehead  . Compare   Whitted  .

variants.name: Whited
meanings: Shortened form of English   Whitehead  .

nameMeanings.name: Browning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Brouning (Old English Brūning), a derivative of the byname Brūn (see Brown ).

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Browning was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brunning
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the Old English personal name Brūning, with shortening of the vowel. Compare Browning .
North German (Brünning): variant of Brüning (see Bruning ). Compare Bruenning .

variants.name: Brining
meanings: English: variant of   Browning  .
Americanized form of German   Breuning   or of its variant   Breining  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Màiri .

variants.name: Màiri
meanings: Gaelic equivalent of Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Harriet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of French Henriette, a feminine diminutive of Henry (French Henri) coined in the 17th century. It was quite common in England in the 18th and early 19th centuries.

historicEvents.description: War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: The Hermitage is Built
historicEvents.description: The Hermitage located in Nashville, Tennessee was a plantation owned by President Andrew Jackson from 1804 until his death there in 1845. The Hermitage is now a museum.

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
Historical Boundaries -  1859: Clark, Arkansas, United States 1873: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Bauxite Mining Began
historicEvents.description: Bauxite a rock with relatively high aluminum content, is the main source of aluminum for the world. When it was discovered in Arkansas it changed the state. The city of Bauxite, Arkansas was the site of the discovery.
historicEvents.urlTitle: JSTOR- Background and Early History of a Company Town: Bauxite, Arkansas

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning was born on 11 April 1808, in Tennessee, United States, her father, John Whitehead, was 25 and her mother, Harriet, was 22. She married Henry W Shuffield about 1824. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1880 and Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1900. She died on 13 December 1905, in Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 97, and was buried in Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning est née le 11 avril 1808, à Tennessee, États-Unis, son père, John Whitehead, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Harriet, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry W Shuffield environ 1824. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1880 et à Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1900. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1905, à Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning am 11. April 1808 in Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Whitehead 25 und ihre Mutter Harriet 22. Sie hat um 1824 Henry W Shuffield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1880 hat sie in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und 1900 in Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1905 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning è nata il il 11 aprile 1808 nel Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Whitehead, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Harriet, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry W Shuffield circa 1824. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880 e nel Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1900. Morì il 13 dicembre 1905, nel Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Harriet Whitehead Browningが1808年4月11日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州で生まれた時，父John Whiteheadは25歳，母Harrietは22歳であった。約1824年にHenry W Shuffieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェに，1900年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングヘンダーソン トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼女は1905年12月13日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビートンで97歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビスマルックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning(이)가 1808년 4월 11일 미국 테네시 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Whitehead(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Harriet(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1824년 Henry W Shuffield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1880년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 데 록헤에서, 1900년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 헨더슨 타운시프에서 살았다. 그녀는 1905년 12월 13일 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비턴에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비스마c크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning nasceu em 11 de abril de 1808, em Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Whitehead, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Harriet, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry W Shuffield aproximadamente 1824. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em De Roche, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1880 e em Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1900. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1905, em Beaton, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Harriet Whitehead Browning родилась 11 апреля 1808 г. в местности Теннесси, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Whitehead было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Harriet, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry W Shuffield около 1824 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году и в местности хендирсон тоуншип, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году. Она умерла 13 декабря 1905 г. в местности битон, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности бисмаркк, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.
